seoTitle: Brunswick County Schools Calendar 2026-2027 | Holidays, Breaks, PDF & Important Dates
seoDescription: View Brunswick County Schools Calendar 2026-2027 with first day, last day, holidays, spring break dates, teacher workdays, printable PDF, and calendar download.
calendarNotes: Brunswick County Schools starts the 2026-2027 traditional school year on August 24, 2026 and ends on May 28, 2027. Spring Break runs March 29-April 2, and the calendar also lists required workdays, non-required workdays, district PD days, holidays, annual leave, report card releases, semester endings, graduation schedules, school hours, and make-up day notes. A separate Early College calendar is available from the district.

customSections.label: Brunswick County Schools Calendar Overview
customSections.content: The Brunswick County Schools 2026-2027 traditional calendar provides important dates for students, families, teachers, and staff in Brunswick County, North Carolina. The school year begins on August 24, 2026 and ends on May 28, 2027. This calendar includes student holidays, required workdays, non-required workdays, district professional development days, annual leave dates, report card releases, semester endings, graduation schedules, school hours, and weather make-up notes. Families should also note that Brunswick County Schools publishes a separate Early College calendar, so program-specific dates may differ from the traditional calendar.

customSections.label: Quick Answer: Brunswick County Schools 2026-2027
customSections.content: Brunswick County Schools starts the 2026-2027 traditional school year on Monday, August 24, 2026. The last day for students is Friday, May 28, 2027. Spring Break runs Monday, March 29 through Friday, April 2, 2027. The calendar also includes teacher workdays, district professional development days, annual leave, report card dates, graduation dates, and a separate Early College calendar for eligible students.

rows: Yes, required and non-required workdays are listed

customSections.label: How We Verify Brunswick County Schools Calendar Dates
customSections.content: MySchoolDates reviews the publicly available Brunswick County Schools printable calendars page and the official calendar PDF linked for this school year. Key dates such as the first student day, last student day, Spring Break, holiday ranges, workdays, report card releases, and graduation dates are compared against the published source before the page and calendar download are generated. MySchoolDates is an independent reference and is not affiliated with Brunswick County Schools, so families should confirm last-minute revisions with BCS directly.

customSections.content: Most Brunswick County Schools students follow the traditional calendar summarized on this page. Some students may follow a separate Early College calendar or program-specific schedule, so families should confirm which calendar applies before relying on first day, break, workday, or graduation dates.

customSections.label: What's New in the Brunswick County Schools 2026-2027 Calendar?
customSections.content: The 2026-2027 Brunswick County Schools calendar keeps the traditional academic structure from the prior year while shifting the school-year dates for the new cycle. Families comparing years should review first day timing, spring break timing, teacher workdays, and graduation dates before making long-term plans.

customSections.label: How to Plan Around Brunswick County Schools Holidays
customSections.content: Families often use the Brunswick County Schools calendar to plan around student attendance, work schedules, and school-specific deadlines. The most important planning dates are the first day of school, Thanksgiving holiday period, winter holiday period, Spring Break, workdays when students do not attend, report card releases, graduation dates, and the final student day.

groups.label: Family travel and vacations
items: Use Spring Break and the winter holiday period as the main travel windows for students on the traditional calendar.
Check annual leave and workday dates around holidays because they can extend or shorten family planning windows.

groups.label: Childcare and transportation
items: Treat required workdays, non-required workdays, district professional development days, and annual leave days as student no-school dates unless BCS announces a make-up change.
Confirm bus, after-school, and program schedules directly with the school for early release, testing, and program-specific dates.

groups.label: Program-specific calendars
items: Students in Early College programs may follow a separate Brunswick County Schools calendar.
Graduation times and school events should be confirmed through school announcements as the year approaches.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Brunswick County Schools start school in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day for students is Monday, August 24, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Brunswick County Schools Spring Break in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, March 29 through Friday, April 2, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Brunswick County Schools in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day for students is Friday, May 28, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: Does BCS have a separate Early College calendar in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. The district provides a separate 2026-2027 Early College calendar linked as an alternate calendar on this page.

calendarFaqs.q: Are teacher workdays included in the Brunswick County school calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. The 2026-2027 traditional calendar lists required workdays, non-required workdays, and district professional development days. These dates should generally be treated as student no-school days unless BCS announces a schedule change.

calendarFaqs.q: Are Brunswick County Schools calendars different by school or program?
calendarFaqs.a: Most students use the traditional Brunswick County Schools calendar, but the district also publishes a separate Early College calendar. Families should confirm the student's school or program calendar before making plans.

calendarFaqs.q: Where can I download the Brunswick County Schools calendar PDF?
calendarFaqs.a: Use the PDF link on this page or the official Brunswick County Schools printable calendars page to view the current district calendar PDF.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Thanksgiving Break for Brunswick County Schools in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Thanksgiving Holiday is listed for November 26-27, 2026, with annual leave listed on November 25, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is winter break for Brunswick County Schools?
calendarFaqs.a: The winter holiday period includes Christmas Holiday on December 24 and December 28, 2026, annual leave on December 23 and December 29-31, 2026, and New Year's Day Holiday on January 1, 2027. Families should also note workdays on December 21-22, 2026 and January 4-5, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: How many school days are in the Brunswick County Schools 2026-2027 calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: This page focuses on the published calendar dates rather than treating an instructional-day count as an official district statement. Families who need an exact attendance-day count should verify it with Brunswick County Schools.

calendarFaqs.q: Does Brunswick County Schools have early dismissal days?
calendarFaqs.a: The traditional 2026-2027 calendar summarized here does not list a dedicated early dismissal date. Families should check school announcements for early release, testing, athletic, or emergency schedule updates.

calendarFaqs.q: When does the 2027-2028 Brunswick County Schools calendar release?
calendarFaqs.a: Brunswick County Schools has a 2027-2028 traditional calendar available from the district, and MySchoolDates links the next calendar year from this page when it is included in the site.
